inputs.label: Pre-Money Valuation
inputs.businessContext: Company valuation before any investment or sweat equity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Company valuation before any investment or sweat equity.

businessContext_i18n.es: Valoración de la empresa antes de cualquier inversión o capital sudor.

inputs.businessContext: Total cash investment from other parties.

inputs.label: Hours Worked
inputs.businessContext: Total hours contributed as sweat equity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total hours contributed as sweat equity.

inputs.label: Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Market hourly rate for the contributor's skills.

businessContext_i18n.en: Market hourly rate for the contributor's skills.
